title: Morgan’s Rule Turns Violent
description: On pages 13–16, this part centers on Zoro’s endurance, Helmeppo’s cruelty, and Luffy’s decision to recruit the captured swordsman.
scene: In Shells Town, Luffy, Coby, and Zoro are drawn into the cruelty of Morgan’s rule and Helmeppo’s privilege.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Zolo! there's been an ACCIDENT! it's Kuna!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: MAN! YOU MADE A PROMISE YESTERDAY!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: You CAN'T RUN AWAY FROM YOUR PROM- ISE!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: SENSE!! MAY I HAVE HER SWORD?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I'll have to keep the promise for both of us.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I'm going to become such a great master swordsman that my name will be known even in heaven!!!

summary: The Shells Town conflict uses Zoro’s imprisonment and Morgan’s rule to test what kind of people Luffy chooses to trust. The section moves Zoro closer to becoming Luffy’s first crewmate.
